description.en: The China National Coal Association (CNCA) is the national industry organization representing China's coal sector, the world's largest coal producer and consumer. CNCA publishes comprehensive statistics on coal production, consumption, imports and exports, pricing, safety records, and enterprise operations. Coal remains central to China's energy mix and industrial supply chain, making CNCA data essential for understanding China's energy security, price dynamics, and the pace of its coal-to-clean energy transition. The association also tracks coking coal supply for the steel industry and thermal coal consumption for power generation, providing detailed breakdowns by region, enterprise type, and end use.
description.zh: 中国煤炭工业协会（中煤协）是代表中国煤炭行业的全国性行业组织。中国是全球最大的煤炭生产国和消费国。中煤协发布煤炭产量、消费量、进出口、价格、安全生产及企业运营等方面的综合统计数据。煤炭在中国能源结构和工业供应链中仍占核心地位，因此中煤协数据对理解中国能源安全、价格动态及煤炭向清洁能源转型的进程至关重要。协会同时追踪钢铁行业炼焦煤供应和发电用动力煤消费情况，并按地区、企业类型和用途提供详细分类数据。

en: Coal production: monthly national coal output by province and enterprise type (state-owned, private)
Coal consumption: total consumption broken down by power generation, steel, chemicals, building materials, and other end uses
Coal imports and exports: monthly import volume by source country (Australia, Indonesia, Russia, Mongolia) and export statistics
Coal prices: thermal coal and coking coal spot prices at major trading hubs (Qinhuangdao, Shanxi, Inner Mongolia)
Enterprise operations: revenue, profit, and employment data for large coal enterprises above designated size
Safety statistics: coal mine accidents, fatality rates, and safety inspection results
Reserve and resource data: proven coal reserves, resource distribution by region, and mine production capacity
Annual coal industry report: comprehensive overview of China's coal sector performance and outlook
Transportation data: coal railway and port throughput volumes at major logistics hubs
zh: 煤炭产量：按省份和企业类型（国有、民营）分类的月度全国煤炭产量
煤炭消费：按发电、钢铁、化工、建材等终端用途分类的消费量
煤炭进出口：按来源国（澳大利亚、印尼、俄罗斯、蒙古国）分类的月度进口量及出口统计
煤炭价格：主要交易枢纽（秦皇岛、山西、内蒙古）动力煤和炼焦煤现货价格
企业运营：规模以上煤炭企业的营业收入、利润和从业人员数据
安全生产统计：煤矿事故、死亡率及安全检查结果
储量与资源数据：已探明煤炭储量、各地区资源分布及矿山生产能力
煤炭行业年度报告：中国煤炭行业运行综述与展望
运输数据：主要物流枢纽的铁路和港口煤炭吞吐量
